name: Annotations
text: @name and @name(args) — metadata annotations on declarations

name: C ABI Trampolines
text: automatic ForgeString/ptr coercion for FFI calls

name: Channels
text: ch <- val (send), <- ch (recv) — typed channel communication

name: Closures
text: (params) -> body — first-class closures with scope capture

name: Collections
text: list and map literals with type-safe operations

name: Component Config
text: typed config blocks with defaults in component templates

name: Component Events
text: event/on — hookable lifecycle events in components

name: Component Syntax
text: @syntax — pattern-based sugar for component DSLs

name: Components
text: template-driven component system with provider integration

name: Datetime
text: datetime_now/format/parse — epoch millisecond timestamps

name: Defer
text: defer expr — execute when scope exits, LIFO order

name: Duration Literals
text: 7d, 24h, 5m, 10s — duration literal suffixes

name: Enums
text: enum Name { Variants } — algebraic data types with match support

name: Error Messages
text: comprehensive error messages with codes and help text

name: Error Propagation
text: Result types with ? propagation and catch blocks

name: Extern FFI
text: extern fn — C ABI foreign function declarations

name: For Loops
text: for x in collection — iterate lists, ranges, maps, channels

name: Functions
text: fn declarations with type inference and implicit return

name: Generics
text: <T> type parameters with optional trait bounds

name: If/Else
text: if/else — conditional expressions with implicit return

name: Immutability
text: immutable by default — let (frozen), mut (mutable), const (compile-time)

name: Imports
text: use statements for provider imports

name: Is Keyword
text: value is Pattern — runtime type and pattern checks

name: It Parameter
text: it — implicit single parameter in closures

name: JSON Builtins
text: json.parse/stringify — JSON serialization/deserialization

name: Null Safety
text: x? (unwrap), x?.field (chain), x ?? default (coalesce)

name: Operators
text: arithmetic, comparison, and logical operators

name: Parallel
text: parallel execution primitives

name: Pattern Matching
text: match expr { pattern -> body } — exhaustive pattern matching with guards

name: Pipe Operator
text: expr |> fn — left-to-right function/method chaining

name: Process Uptime
text: process_uptime() — milliseconds since process start

name: Query Helpers
text: query builder utilities for structured data

name: Ranges
text: start..end (exclusive), start..=end (inclusive) — range expressions

name: Select Syntax
text: select { x <- ch -> body } — multiplex channel receives

name: Shell Shorthand
text: $"cmd" — execute shell command, return stdout

name: Shorthand Fields
text: { name } instead of { name: name } — shorthand struct fields

name: Spawn
text: spawn { } — lightweight concurrent task execution

name: Spec Test
text: spec/given/then — BDD-style behavior-driven tests

name: String Templates
text: "...${expr}..." — template literal string interpolation

name: Strings
text: UTF-8 strings with built-in methods

name: Structs
text: struct declarations, literals, and field access

name: Table Literal
text: table { cols | rows } — tabular data literals

name: Tagged Templates
text: tag"..." — tagged template literal processing

name: Traits
text: trait/impl — interfaces and polymorphism

name: Tuples
text: (a, b) — fixed-size heterogeneous collections with destructuring

name: Type Operators
text: without/only/partial — type-level field transformations

name: Validation
text: validate() — runtime value validation

name: Variables
text: let/mut/const — immutable-by-default bindings with type inference

name: While Loops
text: while cond { } — conditional loop

name: With Expression
text: expr with { field: val } — immutable copy with overrides

name: int
text: 64-bit signed integer type. Supports arithmetic (+, -, *, /, %), comparison, and bitwise operations.

name: float
text: 64-bit floating-point type (IEEE 754 double). Supports arithmetic and comparison operations.

name: string
text: UTF-8 string type. Immutable value type with a rich set of built-in methods.

name: string.length
text: Get the number of characters in the string.

name: string.split
text: Split the string by a separator, returning a list of parts.

name: string.trim
text: Remove leading and trailing whitespace.

name: string.contains
text: Check if the string contains a substring.

name: string.upper
text: Convert all characters to uppercase.

name: string.lower
text: Convert all characters to lowercase.

name: string.starts_with
text: Check if the string starts with a given prefix.

name: string.ends_with
text: Check if the string ends with a given suffix.

name: string.replace
text: Replace all occurrences of a substring with another.

name: string.parse_int
text: Parse the string as an integer.

name: string.repeat
text: Repeat the string n times.

name: bool
text: Boolean type with values `true` and `false`. Supports logical operators (&&, ||, !).

name: list
text: Generic ordered collection. Declared as `list<T>` where T is the element type.

name: list.length
text: Get the number of elements in the list. Accessed as a property, not a method call.

name: list.push
text: Append an element to the list, returning the new list.

name: list.map
text: Transform each element using a function, returning a new list.

name: list.filter
text: Keep only elements for which the function returns true.

name: list.sorted
text: Return a new list with elements sorted in ascending order.

name: list.each
text: Iterate over elements for side effects. Returns void.

name: list.find
text: Return the first element matching the predicate, or null.

name: list.any
text: Return true if any element matches the predicate.

name: list.all
text: Return true if all elements match the predicate.

name: list.sum
text: Sum all elements in a list of integers.

name: list.join
text: Join all elements into a single string with a separator.

name: list.reduce
text: Reduce the list to a single value by applying a function cumulatively.

name: list.enumerate
text: Return a list of index-value pairs.

name: list.clone
text: Create a shallow copy of the list.

name: map
text: Generic key-value collection. Declared as `map<K, V>`. Keys are strings by default.

name: map.has
text: Check if the map contains a given key.

name: map.get
text: Get the value for a key, or null if not found.

name: map.keys
text: Return a list of all keys in the map.

name: map.length
text: Get the number of entries in the map. Accessed as a property.

name: json
text: JSON namespace for parsing and serialization. Not a value type -- used as `json.parse()` and `json.stringify()`.

name: json.parse
text: Parse a JSON string into a typed value. The target type is inferred from context.

name: json.stringify
text: Serialize a value to a JSON string.

name: F0001 — Unexpected token
text: The parser encountered a token it did not expect at this position.

name: F0002 — Unterminated string literal
text: A string literal was opened but never closed.

name: F0003 — Unterminated template literal
text: A template literal was opened but never closed.

name: F0006 — Invalid numeric literal
text: A numeric literal could not be parsed as a valid number.

name: F0012 — Type mismatch
text: The type of an expression does not match what was expected.

name: F0013 — Cannot assign to immutable variable
text: Attempted to assign a new value to an immutable variable.

name: F0014 — Wrong number of arguments
text: A function was called with the wrong number of arguments.

name: F0020 — Undefined variable
text: A variable was referenced that has not been defined in the current scope.

name: F0072 — Unknown annotation
text: An annotation was used that is not recognized as a core or provider annotation.

name: F0073 — Annotation target mismatch
text: A type-level annotation was used on a field, or vice versa.

name: F0074 — Provider annotation outside its context
text: A provider-scoped annotation was used outside its provider context.

name: F0801 — Unused variable
text: A variable was declared but never used.

name: F9999 — Internal compiler error
text: The compiler encountered an unexpected internal error.
